name: aidome-endpoint-switchboard
description: Configure AI coding assistants to route through enterprise-approved LLM endpoints. Supports Continue, Cline, Roo Code, Kilo Code, Codex CLI, and more.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with LLM Endpoint Switchboard
walkthroughs.description: Configure your AI coding assistants to use enterprise-approved endpoints

steps.title: Welcome to LLM Endpoint Switchboard
steps.description:
This extension helps you configure AI coding assistants (Cline, Continue, Roo Code, etc.) to route through your approved LLM gateway endpoint.

**No data leaves your machine** — this is a configuration tool only.

[Learn More](https://github.com/AIdome-co/aidome-endpoint-switchboard-vscode#readme)

steps.title: Run the Setup Wizard
steps.description:
The wizard detects your installed AI assistants, creates an endpoint profile, and automatically configures supported assistants.

[Run Setup Wizard](command:aidome-switchboard.setupSwitchboard)

steps.title: Verify Your Configuration
steps.description:
Run the 7-step verification pipeline to ensure your endpoint is reachable and correctly configured.

[Verify Routing](command:aidome-switchboard.verifyRouting)

steps.title: Explore Available Models
steps.description:
View the models and providers available through your gateway endpoint.

[Show Models & Providers](command:aidome-switchboard.showModelsProviders)

scripts.copy-resources: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const dir = 'out/core/registry'; fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('src/core/registry/assistants.registry.json', dir + '/assistants.registry.json');"
